headlineSummary: Anthropic has a mixed but slightly more polarized mix of praise and criticism, while Google Gemini and OpenAI are neutral with limited evidence and are in a close tie [E1] [E2] [E3].

ranking.summary: Anthropic draws both strong praise for Claude Code being easy to use and free of extra VM charges and strong criticism about messy, unmaintainable output, with a neutral mention adding to the mixed picture; this sits in a close tie [E1] [E2] [E3].
Google Gemini is mentioned only neutrally as one of the foundation models people might use, so the signal is limited evidence and stays neutral in a close tie [E3].
OpenAI is mentioned only neutrally through ChatGPT as a commonly used foundation model, giving limited evidence and a neutral reading in a close tie [E3].

evidence.excerpt: They don't charge anything extra for VM time which is nice. I frequently have 2-3 separate Claude Code for web sessions running at once, often prompted from my phone, some of them started while I'm out walking the dog. Works really well!

annotations.rationale: The commenter explicitly praises Anthropic's Claude Code setup as free of extra VM charges and says it 'Works really well!'.

evidence.excerpt: That sounds nice, but what happens when there's something Claude messes up, doesn't know how to do something, or when you have to review the thousand lines it added to your project ? Unless it's a totally vibe coded side project without any tests or quality control of some sort. I'm just curious what you can build with this setup. It just seems to be the way to create a mountain of sloppy, unmaintainable code.

annotations.rationale: The comment explicitly criticizes Claude as error-prone and frames its output as 'a mountain of sloppy, unmaintainable code'.

evidence.excerpt: This is a good resource, however for about 99.99% of people, you are most likely to just use a foundation model like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini etc. so this knowledge/training will get you neither here or there. I would suggest you look into another Karpathy's video -- Deep Dive into LLMs like ChatGPT.

annotations.rationale: ChatGPT is explicitly named as a common foundation model people will use, but the excerpt does not clearly praise or criticize OpenAI.
Claude is explicitly named as a common foundation model people will use, without clear positive or negative judgment of Anthropic.
Gemini is explicitly named as a common foundation model people will use, but no clear sentiment toward Google Gemini is expressed.
